general.title: General
general.appearanceHint: For theme, background and customization, see the <link>Themes</link> tab.
general.vimModeDesc: Enable Vim keybindings in the code editor.
general.wordWrapDesc: Wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally.
general.autoSaveDesc: Automatically save files after a delay when changes are detected.
general.autoSaveDelayDesc: Delay before unsaved changes are saved automatically.
general.showHiddenDesc: Include dot-prefixed files and folders (.env, .gitignore, .config) in the file explorer and search.
general.gitDecorationsDesc: Tint changed files and dim gitignored entries in the file explorer.
general.webglDesc: Hardware-accelerated rendering. Turn off if text shows corruption or blank tiles.
general.webglHint: xterm's WebGL renderer caches glyphs in a GPU texture atlas. On some macOS setups (especially with Nerd Fonts), the atlas corrupts and terminal text becomes unreadable. Turn this off as a fallback — performance dips slightly, but text renders correctly via the DOM renderer.
general.cursorBlinkDesc: Blink the terminal cursor. Off by default for lower idle CPU, matching VS Code and the macOS terminal.
general.fontFamilyDesc: Nerd Font name for icons (e.g. "JetBrains Mono"). Leave blank to auto-detect.
general.defaultShellDesc: Shell for new terminal tabs. Existing tabs keep their shell.
general.defaultShellIntegrated: Command blocks and directory tracking are unavailable for this shell.
general.letterSpacingDesc: Extra horizontal space between characters (px). Use negative values to tighten Nerd Fonts.
general.scrollbackDesc: Lines of history kept per terminal. Higher uses more RAM (~3 KB / line).
general.codingNotificationsDesc: Alert when Claude Code or Codex running in a terminal needs your input or finishes. Desktop notification when Terax is unfocused, in-app otherwise.
general.launchAtLoginDesc: Open Terax automatically when you sign in.
general.restoreWindowDesc: Reopen the main window where you left it. Applies on next launch.

themes.title: Themes
themes.editorThemeDesc: Syntax colors for the code editor. Auto follows the app theme.
themes.bgDropHint: Drop an image here or pick one. Stored locally; doesn't affect the default look until set.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.resetDialogDesc: This will revert all your custom keyboard shortcuts to their factory defaults. This action cannot be undone.

models.title: Models
models.description: Connect the providers you use. Keys live in your OS keychain and are used only by Terax.
models.noProvidersHint: Click "Add provider" to connect a cloud or local model source.
models.optional: Optional — leave empty for unauthenticated endpoints
models.name: Name
models.sttOpenai: Uses your official OpenAI API key and the Whisper model for transcription.
models.sttGroq: Uses your official Groq API key and Groq's Whisper endpoint for transcription.
models.sttWhispercpp: Connects to a local Whisper.cpp server for fully offline transcription.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Personas and snippets the AI uses. Switch agents from the input bar.
agents.snippetsDesc: Reusable instructions you can drop into any prompt with #handle.
agents.noSnippets: No snippets yet. Create one and insert it with #handle in the AI input.
agents.agentDescriptionPlaceholder: One line — shown in the agent picker
agents.instructionsPlaceholder: Persona & rules. Appended to Terax's core system prompt.
agents.snippetDescriptionPlaceholder: One line — shown in the # picker
agents.contentPlaceholder: Inserted into the prompt as a <snippet> block when you use #handle.
agents.handleLowercase: Lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only.
agents.customInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Always reply in concise bullet points. Prefer pnpm over npm. My machine is an M-series Mac.
